text: Production API gateway is returning 500 errors for 100% of requests. All customers are affected. Revenue is being lost every minute. Started 8 minutes ago.
My laptop won't connect to the office VPN. I've tried restarting. Need access for a client call tomorrow morning.
Database replication lag has increased to 45 seconds on the reporting replica. Analytics queries are returning stale data. Started about 2 hours ago.
Employee Jake Winters left the company 3 weeks ago but his account is still active and he accessed the HR portal yesterday according to audit logs.
The login page is loading slowly - about 8 seconds instead of the usual 1-2 seconds. Users are complaining but can still log in.
Can you change the font on the internal wiki homepage from Arial to Helvetica? Not urgent at all.
MFA is broken for all users trying to log in with Google SSO. Nobody can access internal tools. Engineering, Sales and Support are all blocked.
Server rack in DC-West is showing disk usage at 94% on the primary storage node. Not critical yet but trending up fast.
